title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_cherry_pick_continue
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_cherry_pick_continue' MCP tool.

workspaceRoot.description: Repo path. Default: first MCP root / cwd.

action.description: "continue" (default): resolve conflicts, stage them, then resume the sequencer. "abort": roll back to the pre-cherry-pick HEAD.
